Get Clients With 0 Ad Spend
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 101 --

Overview: Types
1. Overview
2. Lead Generation
3. Lead Nurture
4. Sales
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 101 --

Overview
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 101 --

Overview
Objective - Speed to Money
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 101 --

Overview
Money Math:
(Cost 2hr)
60 out reach attempts
15 respond (25%)
5 take 10min Call (33%) - 50min
3 Show 60min Sales call (50%) - 3hrs
Close 1 (33%)
Price: $2000
$/hr = 2000/10hrs = $200/hr
Additional Cost (Intermittent hours Responding) - 4hrs
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 101 --

Overview
Total Cost: 10hrs of your day
If you have no money, start here.
Once you have some money, Pay someone 12-15/hr to
message people and follow the process.
For $90/day you could have someone setting you 5 warm up
calls a day. $20 per organic call set.
Until you get ads to replicate those results, this may be an
easier set up to scale with less tech knowledge.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 101 --

Overview

If you have no money, start here.
Once you have some money, Pay someone 12-15/hr to

calls a day. $20 per organic call set.
Until you get ads to replicate those results, this may be an
easier set up to scale with less tech knowledge.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 101 --

Overview: Types
If you are not making what you want, then you need
to stop doing what you are doing and take massive
action.
You will suck. Then you will suck less. Then one day,
you will suck so little youre actually good.
This goes for sales & messaging & life.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 101 --

Lead Generation
1. Strategy
a. Messenger Script
b. 10min Rapport Call
2. Set Up IG & FB Profile
3. Two Types of Organic Traffic
a. Warm
b. Cold
4. Warm Outreach
a. FB
b. IG
c. LinkedIn
5. Cold Outreach
a. IG
b. FB
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 101 --

THREE OPTIONS:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 101 --

Lead Generation
1. If selling remotely to clients not in your area…
a. 10min Call Script & Set Next Appt
b. Application
c. Close on High Ticket Personalized Coaching $2000
i. 16 weeks
2. If selling to people in your local area…
a. 10min Call Script & Set Next Appt IN PERSON
b. Application
c. Close on High Ticket Coaching (Remote with 14 day
in person check-ins)
d. 16 weeks.
3. If you’re a monster salesperson, just sell on the first call.
$600-$1000 price point for 6-8 week program that is
templated.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 36 of 101 --

-- 52 of 101 --

Lead Gen Strategy
10min Rapport Call Script
OBJECTIVE: Compliment, Gain Trust, Schedule 60minCall
NOTE*: If someone is in your local market, you can just set
an in person appointment and close them there.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 56 of 101 --

Lead Gen Set Up
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 57 of 101 --

Lead Gen Setup
How To Set Up Your FB Profile
1) Cover Photo: Transformations, Headline, Call To Action
2) Profile Pic: Professional FACE ONLY PIC, SMILING
3) “ABOUT”: WHO YOU HELP DO WHAT WITHOUT BOO
4) Link to Business Page (Same Rules Apply)
5) Featured Photos: Lead Magnet (encouraged - make it amazing),
Pictures that reflect what you do & who you help
6) Link To Lead Magnet: Ebook, Or 10min Video breaking 1 Belief,
with link to apply underneath
a) Belief Breaking Video:
i) Say What Most Believe
ii) Say Why it is wrong
iii) Say what is right
iv) Show proof
b) 3D Image Maker for Lead Magnet (if you want)
OBJECTIVE: Authority, Social Proof, Value First
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 58 of 101 --

Lead Gen Setup
How To Set Up Your FB Profile
1) Cover Photo: Transformations, Headline, Call To Action

4) Link to Business Page (Same Rules Apply)

ii) Say Why it is wrong
iii) Say what is right
iv) Show proof
b) 3D Image Maker for Lead Magnet (if you want)
OBJECTIVE: Authority, Social Proof, Value First
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

5) Featured Photos: Lead Magnet (encouraged - make it amazing),
Pictures that reflect what you do & who you help
6) Link To Lead Magnet: Ebook, Or 10min Video breaking 1 Belief,
with link to apply underneath
a) Belief Breaking Video:
i) Say What Most Believe
ii) Say Why it is wrong
iii) Say what is right
iv) Show proof
b) 3D Image Maker for Lead Magnet (if you want)
OBJECTIVE: Authority, Social Proof, Value First
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 66 of 101 --

Lead Gen Setup
How To Set Up Your FB Profile
1) Cover Photo: Transformations, Headline, Call To Action
2) Profile Pic: Professional FACE ONLY PIC, SMILING
3) “ABOUT”: WHO YOU HELP DO WHAT WITHOUT BOO
4) Link to Business Page (Same Rules Apply)
5) Featured Photos: Lead Magnet (encouraged - make it amazing),
Pictures that reflect what you do & who you help
6) Link To Lead Magnet: Ebook, Or 10min Video breaking 1 Belief,
with link to apply underneath

i) Say What Most Believe
ii) Say Why it is wrong
iii) Say what is right
iv) Show proof
b) 3D Image Maker for Lead Magnet (if you want)

-- 84 of 101 --

Lead Nurture
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 85 of 101 --

Lead Nurture: Follow Up
Two Options:
1) “Personalized” Email
a) PRO: Easiest Tech-wise
b) PRO: Higher Response Rate
c) CON: More Time
Objective: Clarify Goals, Break Beliefs, Get To Show
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 86 of 101 --

Lead Nurture: Follow Up
Two Options:
1) “Personalized” Email
a) PRO: Easiest Tech-wise
b) PRO: Higher Response Rate
c) CON: More Time
2) Link to application
a) CON: Harder Tech-wise
b) CON: Lower Response Rate
c) PRO: Less Time/More Scalable
Objective: Clarify Goals, Break Beliefs, Get To Show
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 87 of 101 --

Lead Nurture: Follow Up
Two Options:
1) “Personalized” Email
a) PRO: Easiest Tech-wise
b) PRO: Higher Response Rate
c) CON: More Time
2) Link to application
a) CON: Harder Tech-wise
b) CON: Lower Response Rate
c) PRO: Less Time/More Scalable
Objective: Clarify Goals, Break Beliefs, Get To Show
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 92 of 101 --

Lead Nurture: Follow-Up
Objective: Get Them To Show, With Buying Intention
Reminder Text/FB Msg
Best reminder sequence:
1) 24hr Before
2) Morning of
3) 60min prior
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 93 of 101 --

Sales
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 94 of 101 --

Overview
Price: $1000-$3000 (depending on sales skills)
Fulfillment: 1 on 1 Coaching (online preferably)
Custom Fitness Plan (MAKE IT SUSTAINABLE)
Custom Nutrition Plan (MAKE IT SUSTAINABLE)
Guarantee:
Hit Your Goal Weight GUARANTEED
(Agree on a realistic goal)
PROVIDED: Check-ins, Food Logged, Workouts
Done
If they meet the requirements: Give them an extra
2 months of service for FREE if they don’t. (This
will rarely happen but it will make the sale easier.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
